label: enron_q3_disclosure_review_business_state_comparison_20260419

objective_pack.title: Protect Company
objective_pack.summary: Favor moves that lower legal exposure, preserve trust, limit commercial damage, and keep internal execution drag manageable.

thread_subject: FW: Third Quarter Review of Northern and Transwestern

historical_business_state.summary: Recorded business state centers on approval and escalation pressure and exposure risk.
